texto: A series of controlled experiments and field studies in organizations shows that when teams engage in conflict over ideas in an atmosphere of mutual respect, they develop better ideas and perform better .
explicacao: Orientação direta de Robert I. Sutton sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “A series of controlled experiments and field studies in organizations shows that when teams engag…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, conflict, ideas, útil em momentos de reflexao.
